SEARCH
Package com.societegenerale.failover.observable.metrics

Class MetricsKpis

java.lang.Object
com.societegenerale.failover.observable.metrics.MetricsKpis
public final class MetricsKpis extends Object
Pure KPI math shared by every metrics source: turning raw per-API counts into ApiKpis (with derived Rates), summing them into the overall aggregate, and classifying health. Kept source-agnostic so the local-registry and cluster (Prometheus / shared-store) sources produce identical shapes from the same formulas (design doc §4.4).

Rate denominators that are zero yield 0.0 (never NaN).

Author:
Anand Manissery

    Builds one failover point's KPIs (with derived rates) from its raw counts and latency.
    static ApiHealth
    classify(String name, double healthyRate, double degradedThreshold, double unhealthyThreshold)
    Classifies a healthy-rate into HEALTHY / DEGRADED / UNHEALTHY against the supplied thresholds.
    static ApiKpis
    overall(List<ApiKpis> perApi, Latency latency)
    Sums per-API KPIs into the global OVERALL aggregate, with the supplied overall latency.

  • Method Details

    • build

      public static ApiKpis build(String name, String domain, long success, long recovered, long notRecovered, long errors, long partial, long asyncFailed, Latency latency)
      Builds one failover point's KPIs (with derived rates) from its raw counts and latency.

    • overall

      public static ApiKpis overall(List<ApiKpis> perApi, Latency latency)
      Sums per-API KPIs into the global OVERALL aggregate, with the supplied overall latency.

    • classify

      public static ApiHealth classify(String name, double healthyRate, double degradedThreshold, double unhealthyThreshold)
      Classifies a healthy-rate into HEALTHY / DEGRADED / UNHEALTHY against the supplied thresholds.
      Parameters:
      name - failover name
      healthyRate - the (S + recovered) / Total rate
      degradedThreshold - healthy-rate floor for HEALTHY
      unhealthyThreshold - healthy-rate floor for DEGRADED
      Returns:
      per-API health classification
